description: rig run-continuity for Codex CLI (#294) — Codex-native mirror of hooks/hooks.json's PreCompact wiring. Reuses the same hooks/preserve-rig-state.sh (it only emits stdout instructions; nothing in it is Claude-Code-specific), so there is exactly one script to maintain across both hosts. Install by copying or symlinking this file to <repo>/.codex/hooks.json (project-scoped) or merging its `PreCompact` entry into ~/.codex/hooks.json (personal, all repos).

hooks.statusMessage: Preserving active rig run-state across compaction
